calendar.matters:
Re-Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Mar-26-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Ryan B. Kadevari, Esq. of Weinberg, Roger & Rosenfeld, T:510.337.1001, for petitioners/moving party;
No other appearance.

RULING: The attorney's fee portion of the tentative ruling was contested and argued. At the conclusion of argument, the Court adopts the tentative ruling on PETITIONER THE BOARD OF TRUSTEES, IN THEIR CAPACITIES AS TRUSTEES OF THE CARPENTER HEALTH AND WELFARE TRUST FUND FOR CALIFORNIA's Re-Noticed Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award as follows:

Petitioners' petition to confirm arbitration award is granted. The arbitration award is confirmed in its entirety and petitioners are awarded $1,597.50 in attorney's fees for this motion plus costs as determined by the memorandum of costs procedures. No opposition filed.

ORDER SIGNED. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: G. Gonzales; Not reported.

Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Nov-06-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances.

PETITIONER THE BOARD OF TRUSTEES, Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award is taken off calendar per the request of the moving party.

Judge: Harold Kahn: J. Rios Merida; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR No. 5976, e-mail: ssawyer@sftc.org. (L&M302)
